repeater.title: Repeater
repeater.tooltip: MQTT Observer Repeater — forwards mesh packets and uplinks to MQTT brokers

roomServer.title: Room Server
roomServer.tooltip: MQTT Observer Room Server — hosts chat rooms and uplinks to MQTT brokers

notice.partition-change: ⚠ PARTITION TABLE CHANGED: First flash must use "Erase device" (merged firmware). NVS settings will be wiped. After the first flash, standard updates work normally.
notice.tlora-observer:
⚠ NO PSRAM: Only one active WSS/TLS MQTT broker is supported. Configure your preferred broker in slot 1 and set unused slots to none.

⚠ PARTITION TABLE CHANGED: First flash must use "Erase device" (merged firmware). NVS settings will be wiped. After the first flash, standard updates work normally.

v1.16.0.notes:
MQTT Observer v1.16.0 (experimental)
  • Up to 6 MQTT broker slots with built-in presets
  • Presets: Analyzer, MeshMapper, MeshRank, Waev, Meshomatic, CascadiaMesh, TennMesh, NashMesh, and more
  • JWT (Ed25519) and username/password authentication
  • Automatic reconnection with exponential backoff
  • After flashing, configure via serial console (115200 baud)

See setup guide for configuration instructions.
